productDisplayName: Nike Men T-Lite 9 Sl Black Sports Shoes
description: Stylish and super comfortable, these T-Lite 9 SL crosstrainers from nike add an extra bounce to your steps. Lightweight and good-looking, you can wear them all day long to feel like you're walking on a bed of cotton. Excellent for all your Sports endevours and casual wear as well. Look spectacular and wow in these comfy shoes.Upper Synthetic leather upper for durability and style Synthetic leather wrap-around overlay along the heel and midfoot for better support Perforations on the forefoot and sides for better breathability Lace-up system with synthetic laces for a snug, customized Fit Lushly padded tongue and well-cushioned collar for in-step comfort and a secure fit Mesh tongue for better ventilation nike swoosh appliqued on sides and tongue for branding and style Midsole EVA midsole for long-term durability and protection of feet against impact Cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Mesh lining for improved breathability Outsole Lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole for better shock absorption Flex  grooves for ease of movement Horizontal lug like patterns for better traction on all surfaces shoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
